OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Checks If the passed NPI is valid or not.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianNPICheckIP

childElements.description: Make callout to NPPES with %NPIID% (coming from OS)
childElements.name: CalloutNPPES
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "preActionLogging" : "%endpoint%", "postActionLogging" : "", "restPath" : "https://npiregistry.cms.hhs.gov/api/?version=2.1&number=%NPIID%", "restMethod" : "GET", "retryCount" : 0, "restOptions" : { "headers" : { }, "params" : { }, "timeout" : 0, "sendBody" : true, "xmlEscapeResponse" : false, "clientCertificateName" : "", "isCompressed" : false }, "namedCredential" : "", "type" : "Integration", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "Chacha Error is coming", "show" : null, "label" : "HTTPAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CreateClinicianTask
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%CreateNPIMissingTask% == true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "DueDate" : "=TODAY()", "Status" : "Open", "ClinicianName" : "%ClinicianName%", "ClinicianContactId" : "%ClinicianContactId%", "Type" : "NPI Number Missing", "Priority" : "High", "DataQualityQueueId" : "%DataQualityQueueId%", "TaskDefaultRecordTypeId" : "%TaskDefaultRecordTypeId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateClinicianTask", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: TryCatchBlock1

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
